title: Dandi2k8's Ad Extendra
description: A continuation of Teddy0008's Ad Extendra
body:
**This is Dandi2k8's continuation of the mod**

Ad Extendra

Ad Extendra is an add-on mod, that adds more content to Ad Astra like it didn't already have enough content.

Existing Features

4 new planets

  • Jupiter
  • Saturn
  • Uranus
  • Neptune

9 new dwarf planets

  • Ceres
  • Eris
  • Gonggong
  • Haumea
  • Makemake
  • Orcus
  • Pluto
  • Quaoar
  • Sedna

1 new exoplanet

Proxima Centauri
  • b

Planned Features

Discoverable Moons

Mars

  • Deimos
  • Phobos

Jupiter

  • Europa
  • Ganymede
  • Io
  • Callisto

Saturn

  • Titan
  • Enceladus
  • Mimas
  • Dione
  • Iapetus
  • Tethys

Uranus

  • Titania
  • Umbriel
  • Miranda
  • Ariel
  • Oberon

Neptune

  • Triton

Orcus

  • Vanth

Pluto

  • Charon
  • Nix
  • Hydra

Haumea

  • Hi'iaka
  • Namaka

Quaoar

  • Weywot

Makemake

  • MK2

Gonggong

  • Xiangliu

Eris

  • Dysnomia
# About versions below 1.1.0 Versions below 1.1.0 require exactly version [1.15.5](https://modrinth.com/mod/ad-astra/version/1.15.5) of Ad Astra. # About versions 1.1.0 and up Versions 1.1.0 and up of this mod require versions [1.15.18](https://modrinth.com/mod/ad-astra/version/1.15.18) and up of Ad Astra.
